description: Send a templated notification to a group or individual recipient.

body.description: Plain text message body with {{path}} template placeholders

bodyHtml.description: Optional HTML message body with {{path}} template placeholders

groupId.description: Notification group ID. All recipients in the group will receive the message. Mutually exclusive with recipientId.

recipientId.description: Specific recipient user ID for single-recipient messages. Mutually exclusive with groupId.

title: Message Node Config
